name: Luna Open Demo WhatsApp Booking Write Pipe

meta.description: Stage 27demo-l + 28c.1 Meta-compatible booking-write pipe. STAGING/DEMO ONLY — INACTIVE in repo. Same path open-demo-whatsapp-booking-write-27l: GET hub.challenge verify (wolfhouse_verify_token) + POST Meta inbound → normalize → guard phone_number_id 1152900101233109 → POST /staff/bot/open-demo-whatsapp-inbound-dry-run with create_demo_hold_draft_confirmed:true and assign_demo_bed_confirmed:true (Staff API gates write). Multi-turn guest_context via Staff API persistence + optional harness flat fields. No Staff API→n8n bridge. No send_live_reply_confirmed. No Stripe/payment-link/confirmation. Staff API is brain.

nodes.name: Code - Map Staff API Booking Write Response

parameters.jsCode:
// Stage 27demo-l — map Staff API booking write response
const http = $input.first().json;
const normalized = $('Code - Normalize Meta WhatsApp Inbound').first().json;
const statusCode = http.statusCode || http.status || 0;
const api = http.body || http;

const proposed = api.review && api.review.proposed_luna_reply
  ? api.review.proposed_luna_reply
  : (api.proposed_luna_reply || null);

return [{
  json: {
    booking_write_pipe_mode: true,
    staff_api_status: statusCode,
    staff_api_success: api.success === true,
    sends_whatsapp: api.sends_whatsapp === true,
    whatsapp_sent: api.whatsapp_sent === true,
    live_send_blocked: api.live_send_blocked !== false,
    no_write_performed: api.no_write_performed === true,
    write_status: api.write_status || null,
    assignment_write_status: api.assignment_write_status || null,
    booking_code: api.booking_code || null,
    booking_id: api.booking_id || null,
    payment_draft_id: api.payment_draft_id || null,
    assigned_bed_label: api.assigned_bed_label || null,
    assigned_room_label: api.assigned_room_label || null,
    calendar_visible_expected: api.calendar_visible_expected === true,
    stripe_link_created: api.stripe_link_created === true,
    payment_link_sent: api.payment_link_sent === true,
    confirmation_sent: api.confirmation_sent === true,
    create_demo_hold_draft_confirmed: api.create_demo_hold_draft_confirmed === true,
    assign_demo_bed_confirmed: api.assign_demo_bed_confirmed === true,
    slim_guest_context_for_next_turn: api.slim_guest_context_for_next_turn || null,
    proposed_luna_reply_preview: proposed ? String(proposed).slice(0, 120) : null,
    guest_phone: normalized.guest_phone,
    wamid: normalized.wamid,
    message_text: normalized.message_text,
    note: 'Stage 27demo-l: n8n pipe only — Staff API brain; booking write flags only.'
  }
}];
